summary: Iteration 2 of SentinelRAG fully validated. 28/28 backend pytest tests passed (17 regression + 11 new for word-boundary guardrails, Chroma chunk-level RBAC pre-filter, /api/chat/stream SSE event sequence, intern CEO no-leak via stream, and live upload→retrieve→delete reflection in Chroma). 10/10 frontend Playwright flows passed (login demo buttons, intern dave streaming with fallback + partial-decision panel, logout, admin tabs, 8-doc table, upload→9 docs, delete→8 docs, audit table with decisions, batch-mode toggle).
critical_code_review_comments: rag.py: rebuild_index lock is held during chromadb add() which downloads the embedding model the first time on cold start; consider warming the model out-of-band so first request after deploy is not slow.

llm_service.stream_answer() is pseudo-streaming — it awaits the full Claude response then yields word tokens with a 0.018s sleep. UX feels live but TTFB is identical to /api/chat. If true streaming matters for long answers, switch to a real streaming SDK call.

guardrails.SENSITIVE_PATTERNS contains multi-word phrases like 'ceo salary' — the surrounding \b in _COMPILED works because spaces are word-boundary-safe, but adding a trailing/leading punctuation pattern unit test would protect against regression if someone reorders the alternation.
server.py /api/documents POST returns 200 instead of 201 (carried over from iter1, still inconsistent).
ChatPage.jsx sendStream() should defensively cap accumulated tokens or abort if the SSE socket stays open without a 'done' event for >N seconds (currently no client-side timeout).
seed_data_creation: Tests temporarily create then delete TEST_admin_upload_doc and TEST_Quarterly_Manager_Brief; cleanup verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-2 acceptance criteria verified end-to-end on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Specific positive proofs: (a) word-boundary regex — 'lessons' does NOT trigger guardrail, 'SSN' & 'social security' DO. (b) Chroma chunk-level pre-filter — intern dave never receives CEO/Q4-Finance/Security-Incident/Marketing chunks across 4 sensitive queries. (c) /api/chat/stream returns Content-Type text/event-stream, exactly one meta first, ≥1 token events, terminated by done; done.answer exactly equals concatenation of token deltas; admin's stream cites Engineering Roadmap; intern's CEO stream answer contains 'unable to find' and zero leak strings (4.8M, 1.2M, 2.1M, 1.5M). (d) /api/chat/stream returns 401 without bearer token. (e) Live Chroma index: admin uploads role_access=[manager,admin] doc — bob retrieves it immediately, dave does not — after delete, bob no longer sees it. Frontend: streaming cursor + partial decision panel with '5 EXCLUDED' shown for intern CEO query; batch toggle changes label STREAMING↔BATCH and full answer rendered post-call. No fixes were needed; only test-script row-counting selector was adjusted (delete-button count instead of tbody>tr).
